title: Add Auto-Playing Hero Trailer
description: Embed a YouTube video in the hero that plays/previews with a mute toggle.
hints: Use YouTube embed URL with autoplay=1&mute=1
solution: Add an iframe with position:absolute covering the hero. Overlay play button. Toggle mute with YouTube API.

title: Build a 'My List' Feature
description: Add/remove items to a persistent 'My List' with localStorage.
requirements: My List section in the browse view
hints: Use a Set stored as array in localStorage
solution: Click toggles item in a Set. Store JSON.stringify([...set]) in localStorage. On load, read list and render My List section.

title: Implement Video Hover Preview
description: Show a short video/gif preview when hovering over a thumbnail.
requirements: Replace static image with short video on hover
Smooth transition between image and video
Play video on hover, pause on leave
solution: Each thumbnail has a hidden <video>. On mouseenter, swap image display:none, video display:block and play(). On mouseleave, reverse.
